title: The physics behind Flow Matching models
summary: Julia Turc provides an in-depth analysis of Flow Matching, a training algorithm for generative models. The video covers the physics foundations including time-variant probability densities, continuity equations, velocity fields, and optimal transport. It explains the flow matching loss, conditional velocity fields, and rectified flow as a related concurrent approach.
